name: Priest

abilities.name: Smite
abilities.desc: Smites the enemy for $d Holy damage.

abilities.name: Litany of Resolve
abilities.desc: Increases the target's Stamina by 3 for 30 min.

abilities.name: Dirge of Decay
abilities.desc: A word of darkness causes $d Shadow damage over 18 sec.

abilities.name: Psalm of Warding
abilities.desc: Shields the target, absorbing 48 damage for 30 sec.

abilities.name: Lingering Grace
abilities.desc: Heals the target for $d over 15 sec.

abilities.name: Mindfracture
abilities.desc: Blasts the target's mind for $d Shadow damage.

abilities.name: Solemn Prayer
abilities.desc: A slow but powerful prayer that heals a friendly target for $d.

abilities.name: Litany of Woe
abilities.desc: Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing $d Shadow damage each second for 3 sec.

abilities.name: Urgent Prayer
abilities.desc: A fast prayer that heals a friendly target for $d.

playbook: You are playing a Priest (mana-based, ranged).
Goal: gain XP safely — kill mobs at or below your level, complete quests, stay alive.
SURVIVE: if HP < 25% and a mob is hitting you, flee or use a defensive; if safe and HP < 60%, eat/consume.
RESOURCE: if mana < 20% and out of combat, drink before pulling.
ENGAGE: pick the nearest hostile within range of your goal, close to ability range (face it), then attack.
ROTATE: cast the first ready ability in "rotation" each GCD (respect cost/cooldown/range/line-of-sight); auto-attack fills the gaps.
LOOT/QUEST: after a kill, loot the corpse; interact with quest objects/NPCs the objective needs.
Avoid pulling Elite/Rare mobs above your level, and don't pull more than you can handle.
